title: Lehoo Castle Arts and Crafts for Kids Painting Set, Craft Kits for Kid Dinosaur Painting Kit, 3D Dinosaur Toys for Age 4 5 6 7 8 9 Year Old, 12 Color Painting Sets for Children
features: Well-equipped Art & Craft Set: 46pcs Package includes 3 different kinds of paintable dinosaurs(Brachiosaurus/Back Fan Dragon/Stegosaurus) and 12 little dinosaurs, 2 paintable dinosaur easter eggs, 1 paintable volcano, 2 furnishing tree, 2 decoration stone, 1 scene map, 2 brush, 2 palette, 12 pigment, 2 glitter glues. The drawing set nurtures children's creative colour exploration, with beginner-friendly materials that build artistic confidence. Designed to develop colour awareness and natural talent, it adds an imaginative dimension to dinosaur-themed play - making learning joyous and engaging.

Skill-Building Play Kit: This hands-on craft activity sparks children's creativity while developing concentration and hand-eye coordination. It nurtures colour recognition skills and provides a calming sensory experience - helping to ease anxiety, reduce stress, and promote mindfulness through the joy of colouring.

Stimulate To Explore Dinosaur World: Includes a large forest playmat - let imaginations run wild creating unique dinosaurs, volcanoes and eggs! Children can then role-play their own dinosaur world while learning about prehistoric life cycles. These creative activities make perfect family bonding time, developing social skills and confidence through joyful shared play.

High Quality and Safety: Crafted from non-toxic, water-based paints and durable PVC plastic dinosaurs, every piece features child-safe rounded edges for worry-free play. Parents can relax knowing our toys eliminate common art-time safety concerns. It's the best arts and crafts for kids age 4 5 6 7 8 9 year old.

Ideal Gift for Kids: This dinosaur painting set doubles as both artwork and toy - the perfect gift for dinosaur enthusiasts aged 3+. Children can bring their colourful prehistoric visions to life, then play with their creations or display them proudly. Should you have any questions, our dedicated support team is always on hand to help. Your family's enjoyment is our top priority.
